title: glechoma elliptica
intro: Glechoma elliptica, also known as Creeping Thyme or Wild Thyme, is a low-growing, spreading perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Glechoma elliptica include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and promote overall well-being due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, teas, tinctures, and topical applications, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
